title: AWS IAM Policy Evaluation
summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how AWS evaluates effective permissions across identity policies, resource policies, permission boundaries, SCPs, and explicit deny.
prerequisites: Understanding of principals, actions, resources, and policies
objectives: Explain AWS IAM policy evaluation order
Differentiate identity policies, resource policies, boundaries, and SCPs
Reason about explicit deny versus allow
Determine effective permissions from multiple policy layers
Prepare for Principal LABs involving cross-account trust, PassRole, and role chaining
